# terrible_ravendb_ravendb_node (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `leader_url` (String) The HTTP/HTTPS URL of the cluster leader the module will contact to add the node.
- `tag` (String) The unique tag for the node (uppercase alphanumeric, 1–4 chars).
- `url` (String) The HTTP/HTTPS URL of the node being added.

### Optional

- `ca_cert_path` (String) Path to a CA certificate bundle to verify the server certificate.
- `certificate_path` (String) Path to a client certificate in PEM format (combined certificate and key). Required for secured clusters (HTTPS with client authentication).
- `type` (String) Node type. Use `Watcher` to add the node as a watcher instead of a full member.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Indicates if the cluster topology was changed or would have changed (check mode).
- `msg` (String) Human-readable message describing the result or error.
